name: Chicken Filling for Vol Au Vent
recipeIngredient: 1 3 lb chicken, cut up in 8 breast, legs and wings
1 can tomatoes, or 5 tomatoes, pelled and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Brown the pieces in olive oil, transferring them to a plate as they brown.
3. Add onions to the pan and cook until soft. Add garlic and mushrooms.
4. Cook vinegar until it evaporates.
5. Add wine and cook until almost evaporated.
6. Add chopped green pepper and tomato to the onions and simmer covered until it becomes a paste.
7. Return chicken pieces to the pan. Bring to a boil.
8. Cover pan and simmer 45 minutes or until chicken is cooked through. Let cool.
9. Remove meat from bones and cut into bite size pieces.
10. Return chicken to sauce. Add olives, bring to a boil.
11. Chill before using.
